act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Payment of arrear tax by instalments.—(1) The Commissioner may,
content:
106. Payment of arrear tax by instalments.—(1) The Commissioner may,
within such time-limit, on such terms and in such manner as may be prescribed, give
permission to a defaulting taxpayer to pay arrear taxes in instalments, and may, for
default in paying any instalment, cancel such permission.
(2) The time- limit for the payment of arrear taxes by instalments granted
under this section shall not be more than 12 (twelve) months.
MAINTENANCE OF FORMS, NOTICES, AND RECORDS

sub_sections.text:
The Commissioner may,
within such time-limit, on such terms and in such manner as may be prescribed, give
permission to a defaulting taxpayer to pay arrear taxes in instalments, and may, for
default in paying any instalment, cancel such permission.

The time- limit for the payment of arrear taxes by instalments granted
under this section shall not be more than 12 (twelve) months.
MAINTENANCE OF FORMS, NOTICES, AND RECORDS
